name: recrest
description: Recrest — A lightweight developer dashboard built with Tauri.

scripts.dev: yarn workspace @recrest/shared build && yarn workspace @recrest/app tauri:dev
scripts.dev:web: yarn workspace @recrest/shared build && yarn workspace @recrest/app dev
scripts.build: yarn workspace @recrest/shared build && yarn workspace @recrest/app tauri:build
scripts.format: yarn workspace @recrest/shared format && yarn workspace @recrest/app format && yarn workspace @recrest/tests format && yarn workspace @recrest/landingpage format
scripts.format:check: yarn workspace @recrest/shared format:check && yarn workspace @recrest/app format:check && yarn workspace @recrest/tests format:check && yarn workspace @recrest/landingpage format:check
scripts.lint: yarn workspace @recrest/shared lint && yarn workspace @recrest/app lint && yarn workspace @recrest/tests lint && yarn workspace @recrest/landingpage lint
scripts.test: yarn workspace @recrest/shared test && yarn workspace @recrest/app test && yarn workspace @recrest/landingpage test
scripts.test:ts: yarn workspace @recrest/shared test:ts && yarn workspace @recrest/app test:ts && yarn workspace @recrest/tests test:ts && yarn workspace @recrest/landingpage test:ts
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @recrest/shared typecheck && yarn workspace @recrest/app typecheck && yarn workspace @recrest/tests typecheck && yarn workspace @recrest/landingpage typecheck
scripts.verify: yarn typecheck && yarn lint && yarn test && yarn rust:check && yarn rust:test && yarn rust:clippy
scripts.verify:release: yarn verify && yarn rust:check:release && yarn rust:test:release
